response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Checked the reference JSON which provided lyrics for '蜜月アン・ドゥ・トロワ' (referenced as '童月アン・ドゥ・トロワ' on screen), matching the second musical performance perfectly. The first song 'SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC' and the skit required full manual transcription.
2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the provided lyrics for Scene 3, while performing 100% manual transcription and translation for Scene 1 (first song) and Scene 2 (talking/skit segment).
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to the audio cues. The dialogue during the skit segment was timed carefully to capture fast overlapping speech without cascading delays.

subtitles.original: リズムに体を預けてみたら ほら 魔法みたい
subtitles.english: If you try surrendering your body to the rhythm, look, it's like magic!

subtitles.original: 騒がしくてバカらしいような フライハイする毎日がいい
subtitles.english: A noisy, silly, fly-high kind of everyday life is great!

subtitles.original: 魔法なんてありえない でも今夜だけは現実になるかも
subtitles.english: Magic is impossible, but maybe just for tonight it will become real

subtitles.original: 体揺らして
音に乗っかって
踊れ君も
終わらない夜に とびきりの魔法
subtitles.english: In this endless night, a very special magic

subtitles.original: 君にもかけてあげるから
subtitles.english: Because I'll cast it on you, too

subtitles.original: 僕の手をとってよ
着替えるなら 鳴り止まないミュージック
subtitles.english: If you're changing, to the non-stop music,

subtitles.original: 魔法が解けるまで 最高で最強な夜が
subtitles.english: until the magic wears off, the best and strongest night...

subtitles.original: 今日も更けていく
こんな夢みたいな日々が 明日も続いていくなら
subtitles.english: If these dream-like days continue into tomorrow,

subtitles.original: ねえ 君はどうする？
アンコール 大胆に夜を飾るソング
subtitles.english: Encore! A song that boldly decorates the night

subtitles.original: 何回でもかける超魔術
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, I'll cast my super magic

subtitles.original: まだまだ続くよ夢心地
subtitles.english: This dreamlike state will go on and on

subtitles.original: 嘘みたいだけど 朝が来るその時まで
subtitles.english: It seems like a lie, but until the morning comes,

subtitles.original: ねえ 僕と踊ろう
わー！やった、勝った勝った！やった！
subtitles.english: Yay! We did it, we won! Yay!

subtitles.original: え？なんか雲美味しそうじゃね？
subtitles.english: Eh? Doesn't that cloud look delicious?

subtitles.original: 食べてみない？
ん、超美味しい！
美味しい！
おいちー！
何がしてるの？！
あ、食べられた！食べられた！やばいやばい！
subtitles.english: Ah, we were caught! We were caught! Oh no, oh no!

subtitles.original: はじめは食べてないです！
はじめは食べてないです！
私の雲！
誰が！
はじめは食べてない！食べてない！
subtitles.english: Hajime didn't eat it! I didn't eat it!

subtitles.original: こぼちゃんのだよ！何言ってるの？
subtitles.english: It's Kobo-chan's! What are you saying?

subtitles.original: Welcome, Kobo! Today is your birthday!
subtitles.english: Welcome, Kobo! Today is your birthday!

subtitles.original: 誕生日！
ハッピーバースデー、こぼ！ハッピーバースデー！
ありがとう！うわー、嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Wow, I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: えー、じゃあ、こぼ先輩と一緒に歌って踊りたい！
subtitles.english: Then, I want you to sing and dance with Kobo-senpai!

subtitles.original: 歌って踊りたい！ダンス、ダンス、ダンス！
subtitles.english: We want to sing and dance! Dance, dance, dance!

subtitles.original: こぼの振り付け！
Wow! Very nice!
こぼの、こぼ先生と呼んでください
こぼおっちゃーん！ガキだから！
じゃあ、勉強した？もちろん！
subtitles.english: So, did you practice? Of course!

subtitles.original: あいちゅとり、こぼちゃん先輩、これ、コレオグラフ？
subtitles.english: Ice tray, Kobo-chan senpai, this... choreography?

subtitles.original: コレオグラフね。じゃあ、いきましょう！
subtitles.english: Choreography, yeah. Well then, let's go!

subtitles.original: いきましょう！Let's go! いいね！
おしゅしゅ乗っけ！おしゅしゅのっけ、オッケーオッケー。じゃあいきましょう。
subtitles.english: Put sushi on top! Put sushi on top, okay okay. Let's go.

subtitles.original: 誰も居なくなった
二人だけの街に
subtitles.english: In the city of just the two of us

subtitles.original: 機械仕掛けの時計が
夜の訪れ知らせる
夕暗が空を
ワイン色に染めて
不慣れな二人を
subtitles.english: Inviting the two of us, who are still inexperienced

subtitles.original: 舞台へと誘う
Chasse 'n' Whisk 'n' Natural-Turn
貴方に魔法をあげる
Throwaway and Oversway
その名前は honey mead
蜜月 Un·Deux·Trois
互いの指を絡めて
